name: harness-engineering-guide
description: Audit, design, and implement AI agent harnesses — the constraints, feedback loops, and verification systems that make AI coding agents reliable. Two-tier assessment model (script pre-screening + LLM final scoring) with explicit script-to-item field mapping, Quick Audit (15 vital-sign items) or Full Audit (45 items), 8 dimensions, 10 project profiles with calibrated weights, 11 ecosystems, 3 lifecycle stages, 26 anti-patterns (preventable/mitigable classification), 6 platform adapters, streaming audit protocol.
author: Luiz
